compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
When `rebar create` makes a work ticket whose type is **not** `bug`/`session_log`
(i.e. `task`/`story`/`epic`), print a **stderr warning** that no `file_impact` was
recorded, nudging the author to run `set-file-impact` before the plan-review gate.
This surfaces the plan-review **file-impact-coverage (P9)** requirement *early*, at
create time, instead of only when `review-plan` runs — so it can be fixed before a
full review round (the churn seen on ticket f112, re-reviewed after file_impact was added).

## Why
`file_impact` cannot be supplied at create time (only via a later `set-file-impact`),
and the P9 detector (`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/det_floor.py:645`, `applicable = not
ctx.children`) flags any leaf work ticket lacking it. `bug`/`session_log` are gate-
exempt upstream (`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/orchestrator.py:540`), so the warning mirrors that exemption.

## Scope
- `src/rebar/_commands/composer.py` `create_cli()`: after a successful create, if
  `ticket_type not in ("bug", "session_log")`, emit
  `print("Warning: no file_impact recorded ...", file=sys.stderr)` (matches existing
  `Warning:`-to-stderr convention in transition.py/txn.py/unlink.py).
- Keep stdout pure (created alias/id line unchanged); warning goes to stderr only.
- Not in scope: a `--file-impact` create flag or MCP structured warning (follow-ups).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `rebar create task "x"` with no file_impact prints a `Warning:` line to **stderr** naming the id and pointing at `set-file-impact`; stdout stays pure (alias/id line only).
- [ ] `rebar create bug "x"` and `rebar create session_log ...` print **no** such warning.
- [ ] A test in `tests/integration/test_stdout_purity.py` (or equivalent) asserts the stderr warning for `task` and its absence for `bug`.
- [ ] `make lint` and the touched tests pass.

file_impact.reason: create_cli emits stderr file_impact warning for non-bug/session_log types
assert stderr warning present for task, absent for bug; stdout stays pure

compiled_state.title: create: warn on stderr when a non-bug ticket is created without file_impact
